calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Petition For Fees Under The Common Fund Theory; Declarations Of Alan N. Herzfeld And Charlotte Mischeaux In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld for Charlotte Mischeaux (Moving Party). Susan Widule for and with Charlene Wiley. Anne Steele for Nita Cobb.

Mr. Herzfeld argued that due to the late filing of Ms. Wiley's opposition, it should not be considered and that her counsel should not be allowed to argue. The Court is inclined to listen to them. Counsel presented oral argument to support their respective positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. Motion is denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Fees Under The Common Fund Theory
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld for Charlotte Mischeaux (Petitioner). Anne Steele for Nita Fay Cobb (Beneficiary). Susan Widule for Charlene Wiley (Beneficiary). Brian Connors litigation Counsel for Betty Shepard was also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Mr. Herzfeld's fees. The Petition for Fees Under The Common Fund Theory was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Petition For Fees Under The Common Fund Theory
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld for Charlotte Mischeaux (Petitioner). Anne Steele for Nita Cobb (Beneficiary). Susan Widule for and with Charlene Wiley (Respondent).

Ms. Steele asked the Court to dismiss the petition based on the terms of the settlement agreement that was approved by the Court. Ms. Widule made the same argument. Mr. Herzfeld argued that Ms. Cobb and Ms. Wiley were not parties to the settlement agreement. The Court wants brief on all issues including the common fund theory. Ms. Steele and Ms. Widule to file their response by July 6 and Mr. Herzfeld to file his reply by July 13. The Petition for Attorney fees under the Common Fund Theory was continued to July 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreetment.
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Braian Connors for Betty Jean Shepard (Respondent). Alan Herzfeld for Charlotte Mischeaux.

Mr. Connors addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the other two daughters have not consented. He argued that the burden is on them to protect their interest. The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement was taken under submission. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provisions, etc. was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreetment.
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Apr-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Apr-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Continued To Mar-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld for Charlotte Mischeaux.

Mr. Herzfeld requested a 60-day continuance stating that they were on the verge of settlement. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Provisions, etc. was continued to March 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Continued To Jan-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Continued To Nov-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Paul Melbostad and Alan Herzfeld, Esq. for Petitioners Charlotte Mischeaux and Kendra Noel Lewis. Brian F. Connors, Esq. for Respondent Betty Jean Shepard.

Matter was argued and discussed, matter was continued to 11-15-11 for possible resolution amount and trust issue.
Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Provisions, Determine Questions Of Construction Of Trust, Ascertain Trust Beneificiaries
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Connors for Betty Shepard (Respondent). Paul Melbostad and Alan Herzfeld for and with Kendra Lewis and for Charlotte Mischeaux.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to removal of the Trustee and whether the Trust has been altered. The Court ordered that Ms. Shepard is not to expend any Trust funds for defense of the Trust until further order of Court (Mr. Melbostad is to prepare said order). The Petition To Determine Validaty of Purported Trust Provisions, etc. was continued to October 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the issue of jurisdication/venue and or how the Parties are going to go forward/plan to proceed. Briefs are due by October 5, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
